channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: AI finds vulns: what defenders miss
item.description: Reduce AI scanner noise 40% in one step — precision vs recall, thresholds, and the concrete config you can apply today.

item.title: Stop async Python surprises before they burn you
item.description: Cut async Python memory 38% and p99 latency 14ms with trio — connection pool leaks, nursery scopes, and the AWS Lambda gotcha most teams miss in 2026.

item.title: MCP servers 2026: why your agent keeps crashing
item.description: Reduce MCP server crashes 90% with error handling, memory limits, and sandbox profiles in 2026 — fixes for Node 20 LTS and Python 3.11 MCP SDKs.

item.title: Offline-first apps: what 3G markets taught us
item.description: Cut sync failures 39% in Nigeria and Kenya with offline-first design — SQLite, SQLCipher, and WatermelonDB 1.6 powering 92% crash-free sessions.

item.title: Postgres 17 replaces Redis, Kafka, and S3 in our stack
item.description: Cut cloud costs 25% by replacing Redis, Kafka, and S3 with a single Postgres 17 instance — connection pooling, logical decoding, and toast compression benchmarks from Jakarta and Dublin clusters.

item.title: Handle mobile money refunds Paystack missed
item.description: By the time we saw the bulk download at 02:15, the customer had already opened a dispute and our reconciliation score dropped from 99.8% to 87.3%…

item.title: AI debt vs human debt: pick the right one
item.description: Cut AI technical debt 40% with human-first reviews — the 3 gates every PR needs, the staging requirement most teams miss, and the $5,510 monthly cost of skipping them.

item.title: Signals beat hooks: 5 state tricks that stuck in 2026
item.description: Cut frontend CPU 18% with signals: benchmarks from 8M req/day dashboards, 3 concrete numbers, and which primitive works outside frameworks

item.title: Build webhooks that never fail twice
item.description: Cut webhook delivery failures 100% with SQS FIFO, Redis 7.2, and idempotency keys — latency drops 87%, cost falls 50%, and PCI-DSS passes in 2026.

item.title: AWS IAM in 10 minutes: least privilege without the pain
item.description: Cut AWS IAM policy lines 70% with least privilege in 10 minutes — use Access Analyzer 2026 and IAM Policy Simulator to avoid the wildcard trap.

item.title: HTMX swapped 5 dev tools for me
item.description: Cut frontend bundle size 90% and AWS costs 50% with HTMX 2.0 — here’s the exact stack swap that worked in production in 2026.

item.title: AI agents lose context: 3 fixes for persistent memory
item.description: Persistent AI memory fails on restart — 3 fixes with Redis 7.2, PostgreSQL 15, and LangChain 0.2.0. Cut context loss to zero with volume mounts, circuit breakers, and shared stores.

item.title: Vibe code: works great, fails forever
item.description: Cut production outages 70% by avoiding these 7 vibe-coding shortcuts — connection pools, logging, and cache mistakes most teams repeat in 2026.

item.title: AI agent postmortem: human loop vs blind replay
item.description: AI agent postmortems: human-loop vs blind replay — 432 injected failures show which catches mistakes faster, cuts false positives 75%, and saves $38 per 1k incidents at scale

item.title: API attacks rising 40%: the 3 patterns to block now
item.description: API response times fell 56% after blocking 40% more attacks with idempotency keys and strict schema validation — real latency, cost, and code you can reuse

item.title: Cut cold starts 70%: Lambda cost hack
item.description: Cut cold starts 70% and save $1,200/month on AWS Lambda — idle timeout tuning, ARM64, and SnapStart steps that actually work in 2026.

item.title: AI glue code: 3 ways to avoid duct-taping models
item.description: Cut irrelevant AI answers 80% by fixing prompt drift, adapter decay, and cold starts — concrete costs, Lambda code, and rollback commands for Nairobi startups using Predibase and NVIDIA NIM in 2026.

item.title: Use feature flags to deploy AI models safely
item.description: Deploy AI models 80% faster with feature flags — canary splits, instant kill switches, and 5-minute rollbacks in 2026. FastAPI, Flagsmith 3.18, Prometheus 2.48.

item.title: Dumped Kubernetes for $200 and no one noticed
item.description: The bill hit $3,240 on the 2nd every month.

item.title: 6 AI tools that paid off for Nairobi teams in 2026
item.description: Cut dev time 38% with AI tools — Nairobi teams using GitHub Copilot 2026, Cursor IDE v0.28, and Sourcegraph Cody Pro hit London-level velocity at local infra cost in 2026.
